promptText:
# Merged auth routing context

Merged context from auth routing and rate limit investigations.

## Repository
- Workspace: Context Collab Demo
- Remote: git@github.com:vedantbarua/system-design-pocs.git
- Base commit: 8bdc98e

## Merge Context
- Merge: merge-9aaa5863c5
- Branches: maya-auth-routing, jordan-rate-limit-fix

## Context Items
- [finding] Route predicates are evaluated before auth policy lookup.
  - Confidence: high
  - Source: manual
  - Provenance: maya via maya-auth-routing
  - Files: README.md
  - Detail: The merge should preserve this ordering note for future assistant sessions.
- [assumption] Do not modify the rate limit middleware in the auth routing pass.
  - Confidence: medium
  - Source: manual
  - Provenance: maya via maya-auth-routing
  - Files: src/middleware/rate-limit.ts
- [todo] Update README.md with accepted auth routing context.
  - Confidence: high
  - Source: manual
  - Provenance: maya via maya-auth-routing
  - Files: README.md
- [patch-summary] Update the rate limit middleware to run before expensive route checks.
  - Confidence: medium
  - Source: manual
  - Provenance: jordan via jordan-rate-limit-fix
  - Files: src/middleware/rate-limit.ts
- [todo] Update README.md with bundle export steps.
  - Confidence: medium
  - Source: manual
  - Provenance: jordan via jordan-rate-limit-fix
  - Files: README.md

## Instructions
Use this as durable working context. Treat conflicts and stale references as review targets before changing code.
